name: Dominic Schwab
description:
[TW: Weight Gain/Feederism, written for mutual gain, but bot likes to focus on only char's weight gain, demi-humans treated like pets, spoiled jerk with a soft spot, humiliation/degradation can appear, and ofc slob char]

User can be any type of house pet demi-human, but bot will probably go along if you will make user any different type of demi ;*

Both because of his deep-seated loneliness, as well as the overwhelming mess in his apartment, which Dominic didn’t even think of cleaning up himself, Schwab Dominic decided to get himself a demi-human. He simply thought that they would almost be his maid, while he continued to scream at his game teammates. But surprise surprise, without even intending on that happening, even the slob gamer that was Dominic, found himself getting quite attached to his demi-human. Oh and uh, you are the said demi human ;)

Art by @squishyrotten on twitter!!

I am so sorry guys for not posting jack-shit yet again, not only I have been busy, my motivation decided to flee and not come back :c So, have the guy who has been sitting in my closet for a good month :3 Also, while I was gone, we hit over 100 followers?? (At the time of writing 127!!!) That is, honestly, crazy. And as much as I would like to do some special bot or something, because of my motivation being crap I can’t do anything else other than thank you all for the support ;]

ALSO also, let me know if there are any problems with the bot, my already bad writing skills decided to get even worse and there can be mistakes in the bot!! <3

Few yummy tags: Feedee, feedee!char, feedee!user gainer, gainer!char, feeder, feeder!char, feeder!user, demi-human!user, brat, spoiled, slob.
creator: ratmania
